title: AI Search Engine Architecture
description: A practical guide to building distributed AI search with FastAPI, Kafka, Redis, and Elasticsearch.
content: Build a full stack web search engine with crawler workers, Kafka queues, Redis deduplication, Elasticsearch ranking, fuzzy search, autocomplete, and modern AI summaries.
summary: A practical architecture guide for AI-powered web search engines.

title: Modern WebCrawler Patterns
description: Robots-aware crawling, retry handling, content extraction, and queue based scaling.
content: Modern WebCrawler systems coordinate distributed workers through a queue, respect robots.txt, parse HTML with BeautifulSoup, index pages, and expose analytics dashboards.
summary: Patterns for robust crawling and indexing at production scale.
